recommendations.title: The Girl with a Bracelet
recommendations.overview: Lise (16 years old) is accused of murdering her best friend. As the trial starts, her parents stand right by her side. But once her secret life is revealed in court, the truth becomes indistinguishable.

recommendations.title: Big Nothing
recommendations.overview: A frustrated, unemployed teacher joins forces with a scammer and his girlfriend in a blackmailing scheme.

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

recommendations.title: Sacco & Vanzetti
recommendations.overview: Boston, 1920. Italian immigrants Nicola Sacco and Bartolomeo Vanzetti are charged and unfairly tried for murder on the basis of their anarchist political beliefs.

recommendations.title: Gang Related
recommendations.overview: After murdering an undercover DEA agent, two corrupt cops scramble to cover up what they've done.

recommendations.title: The Aura
recommendations.overview: A quiet, epileptic taxidermist plans the perfect crime. All he needs is the right opportunity. An accident, perhaps…

recommendations.title: Riki-Oh: The Story of Ricky
recommendations.overview: In 2001, where all correctional facilities have been privatized, martial artist Ricky finds himself victim to the corrupt system, found "guilty" of the manslaughter of an infamous crime boss.

recommendations.title: The Whole Truth
recommendations.overview: A defense attorney works to get his teenage client acquitted of murdering his wealthy father.

recommendations.title: Falling Down
recommendations.overview: An ordinary man frustrated with the various flaws he sees in society begins to psychotically and violently lash out against them.

recommendations.title: Miller's Crossing
recommendations.overview: Set in 1929, a political boss and his advisor have a parting of the ways when they both fall for the same woman.
